claim_challenges.description: Attacks on the specific claims and framings in the two R1 frames and the shared ledger. Substantive — go after the decision logic, not nitpicks.

target_claim.description: The exact claim or framing you are challenging.

objection.description: Why it is wrong, weak, or unsupported.

pool_vetting.description: Vet the SHARED EVIDENCE LEDGER itself, not just the arguments. Is each entry representative? From a reliable source? Is its provenance real and re-openable, or asserted?

ledger_entry.description: Which ledger claim you are vetting (quote or paraphrase).

cruxes_surfaced.description: The load-bearing assumptions the recommendation will rest on — the ones that, if false, flip the answer.

if_false_then.description: How the recommendation changes if this assumption is false.

verified.description: true only if a grounded (re-openable) ledger entry establishes it.

how_to_verify.description: Concrete next step to verify it if unverified.
